hero.title: Warm Algarve evenings, around the fire and the table.
hero.subtitle: Since 1986 we have opened our door in Almancil for a good meal, good conversation and the picanha many guests ask for again, night after night. Here you get to know who serves, who returns and who stays.
hero.sideTitle: For decades we have looked after everyone who walks through this door.
hero.sideText: Almancil families, long-standing regulars and visitors from Quinta do Lago or Vale do Lobo find the same welcome, the same attention and the same unhurried pace.
slidesAlt: Fire and signature grill work at Figueiral.
Dining room tables in warm light — atmosphere and service at Figueiral.
Wine at the table — detail, texture, time passing slowly.
Hospitality around the table — people, conversation, ease.

intro.title: More than serving — we look after the table, the team and those who return.
intro.body: In 1986 we dreamed of an international kitchen with an Algarve soul: regional produce, fire on the grill and a dining room that feels welcoming. Four decades on, many of the faces at the table are regulars — and that says everything.

highlights: Fire on the grill and plates that arrive hot at the table
Bottles gathered over the years to keep conversation going
Guests who have been coming for one, two or three decades
A team regulars already know almost by sight

statement.text: Figueiral was not built in a year. It was built through repeated dinners, familiar faces and the belief that welcoming well means caring about the detail.
statement.caption: In Almancil, some people simply call us «our restaurant»

atmosphere.line: Tables that linger deep into the night.
atmosphere.imageAlt: Warm light across the dining room as the evening stretches at Restaurante Figueiral.

meat.title: The star of the menu remains Brazilian-style picanha.
meat.body: Grilled over fire, sliced at the table, generous and convivial — the dish the press mentions and our guests order most naturally. The preparation is careful; the feeling is of home, not spectacle.
meat.note: Meat, heat and time — the rest takes care of itself.

wine.title: Bottles that keep the evening company, not dominate the table.
wine.body: Over the years we have gathered labels that belong here: for picanha, for fish, for that dinner that runs late without hurry. The choice is ours; the time belongs to whoever is seated.
wine.note: If you want a suggestion, ask — we know who usually orders which bottle.

legacy.title: A house that grew with those who came back.
legacy.body: Opening in 1986 meant believing Almancil could have a home for international cooking without losing the warmth of a family table. Today, part of who we are is the guests who have stayed with us for years — and the team that learns names, dishes and small preferences.
legacy.imageAlt: Ivan and Cláudia at the reception of Restaurante Figueiral.

terrace.title: Open air, warm light and the calm pace of Almancil.
terrace.body: When the weather allows, the table moves outside — close to Quinta do Lago and Vale do Lobo, but with the ease of being at home in the Algarve.

cta.title: Reserve your table for an evening without hurry.
cta.body: For dinner for two, family meals or friends staying in the area. Call or book online — we will seat you as you should be.

reviews.title: Long-standing hospitality, remembered long after the evening ends.

items.quote: A timeless Algarve restaurant with exceptional picanha, warm service and a beautiful atmosphere.
items.author: Recent guest

items.quote: Elegant, relaxed and consistently excellent. A must when staying near Quinta do Lago or Vale do Lobo.
items.author: International traveller

items.quote: A family dining institution in Almancil where hospitality is treated as seriously as the food.
items.author: Algarve dining guide

intro.title: More than serving — for decades we have looked after everyone at our table.
intro.body: Our story begins in 1986, when the dream was simple: a reference for international cooking, yes, but above all a place of welcome in Almancil. Regional produce, attention to detail and the same warmth as always — that is how the story continues.

feature.title: The secret of a good house is the table and the team.
feature.body: Guests who have been coming for years already know the faces on the floor. Looking after people well is not theatre: it is memory — knowing when someone prefers their usual table, when the evening needs more time, when a child needs something simple. The dedication of each person lets the kitchen surprise without losing consistency.

cards.title: Faces that return
cards.body: Regulars, Algarve families and international visitors who have come back often enough to no longer need a menu.

cards.title: Detail in daily life
cards.body: From how the room is laid out to what lands on the plate — we want every dinner to run as it should, without unnecessary formality.

cards.title: A team with memory
cards.body: Those who work with us know the pace of the house, know the tables, know the guests and treat each night with the same dedication.

intro.title: An archive of reputation built over decades.
intro.lead: Over the years, Figueiral has been mentioned by publications tied to food, travel, lifestyle and Algarve culture — reflecting the consistency of a house built in Almancil since 1986.

press.editorialNote: This text is an editorial summary prepared by Restaurante Figueiral. To read the full piece, visit the original article at the publication.

intro.title: Fire, produce and a shared table — how we have cooked for decades.
intro.body: The menu starts at the grill and ends at the table, with dishes to share, wine by the glass or bottle and the calm pace of those in no hurry to leave.

hero.title: The cooking begins at the fire and ends in conversation.
hero.body: Sliced picanha, garlic prawns, fish of the day, house desserts — dishes we know by heart and guests order with confidence. Not a menu to impress; a menu to return to.
hero.note: Choose something from the fire, open a bottle and let the evening find its own time.

interludes.title: Embers, rest and meat served at the right moment.
interludes.body: The grill gives flavour and crust; rest gives juice. It is the work of every night — simple, repeated, done well.

interludes.title: Warm bread, an open bottle and dishes to share.
interludes.body: Dinner finds another rhythm when the table fills with plates in the middle and conversation loses its closing time.

interludes.title: Something sweet to close — or to stay a little longer.
interludes.body: Desserts many guests know by memory, served without hurry, often with a small glass at the end.

categories.title: Signature Meat
categories.description: Cuts for the grill, warm sauces and sides that belong at the table — with picanha at the centre, as it has been for many years.

editorial.label: On the fire
editorial.note: Grilled meat, sliced and served generously — the heart of the house.

items.name: Brazilian-Style Picanha
items.description: The star of the menu: grilled over fire, sliced at the table, served with the classic sides regulars know by heart.

items.name: Matured Ribeye
items.description: A marbled cut, salt on the grill, a marked crust and house sauce — for those who want meat with presence.

items.name: Filet Mignon
items.description: Tender, clean, seasonal vegetables and warm sauce — a table classic without fuss.

categories.title: From the Algarve
categories.description: Fish, seafood and coastal freshness to balance the table — regional produce, cooked simply.

editorial.label: Origin
editorial.note: Olive oil, lemon and herbs — the sea as it should be, without excess adornment.

items.name: Grilled Sea Bass
items.description: Sea bass on the grill, Algarve olive oil, herbs and lemon — light, direct, made for sharing.

items.name: Garlic Prawns
items.description: Hot prawns in garlic and olive oil, flame in the pan — one of the dishes most often ordered to share.

items.name: Seasonal Market Fish
items.description: What arrived well today, cooked simply — it depends on the sea, as it should.

categories.title: To Begin
categories.description: To open the table: warm bread, olive oil, cured meats, vegetables — the first gesture before the grill.

editorial.label: Opening
editorial.note: Starters to get conversation and appetite moving together.

items.name: Cured Meats & Warm Bread
items.description: Portuguese cured meats, bread straight from the oven, olive oil and house preserves — the classic start.

items.name: Burrata with Roasted Tomatoes
items.description: Creamy burrata, slow-roasted tomatoes, fresh basil — light before the meat or fish.

items.name: Fire-Roasted Vegetables
items.description: Seasonal vegetables on the embers, smoked yoghurt and herbs — vegetable with the taste of the grill.

categories.title: Desserts
categories.description: Sweet endings to close the night — or an excuse to stay a little longer at the table.

editorial.label: Finish
editorial.note: To share, or to finish with a small Port wine.

items.name: Caramelised Creme Brulee
items.description: Silky custard, sugar burnt on the spot — simple, classic, comforting.

items.name: Chocolate & Port Wine
items.description: Dark chocolate in layers, a thread of Port wine — for those who still have room.

items.name: Algarve Almond Tart
items.description: Warm Algarve almond tart, vanilla cream — a house dessert, served hot.

intro.title: A wine restaurant in the Algarve where pairing feels personal, not performative.
intro.body: The wine service at Figueiral is built around the table: what guests are celebrating, what they are eating and how the evening should unfold.

feature.title: Portuguese depth, Mediterranean brightness and bottles for memorable evenings.
feature.body: The list is imagined for expressive pairings with fire-grilled meat, Brazilian-style picanha, Algarve seafood and relaxed hospitality.

moments: Portuguese reds for premium picanha and steak
Elegant whites for Algarve fish and terrace lunches
Celebration bottles for romantic dinners and private occasions

intro.title: Cinematic moments from the table, the terrace and the glow of an Algarve evening.
intro.body: A visual expression of premium Mediterranean hospitality: fire, wine, atmosphere and generous service.

intro.title: Reserve a table for a refined Algarve dining experience.
intro.body: Book your table online or call us directly. The ResDiary widget below confirms availability in real time.

widget.title: Book a table — Restaurante Figueiral
widget.fallbackBody: Call or reach out via contact if you need help with groups, special occasions or changes.

intro.title: Find us in Almancil, close to Quinta do Lago and Vale do Lobo.
intro.body: Plan your visit for premium picanha, wine and warm family hospitality in the heart of the Algarve.

footer.closingPhrase: A house in Almancil — fire, wine and tables many already think of as their own.
footer.description: Since 1986, Figueiral has been fire on the grill, a bottle shared and the certainty that those who come once often come back.
footer.locationNote: In Almancil, between Quinta do Lago and Vale do Lobo.
